title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Moria, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Moria, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #13, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The shadow that should be following oz

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: has been possessed by my shadow

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: In other words, common sense is overturned.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So, Oz hasn't become a rubber man,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We can't approach him at all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: Kishishishi, he's more trouble than just rubber!!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: If I make his shadow round,

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: Hey, hey!! Wait a second, Master!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: Please don't mess with my fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Now, crush them one by one, oz!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's too dangerous to approach him, ZORO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: As well as get everyone's shadows back!?

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: It's going to be morning soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Excuse me!!! Please listen to my request!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't hold me responsible for this!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: Didn't think I'd be using "Kuwagata" again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I WON'T EVEN SPARE MY BONES!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Okay!! Make sure you come back!!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Moria, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #13, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare: key exchange.
